stemHtml: For descent problems, the wind direction and velocity used is:

options.a: The wind direction and velocity at the altitude 2/3 of the descent altitude.
options.b: The wind direction and velocity at the altitude 1/2 of the descent altitude.
options.c: The wind direction and velocity at the altitude 1/3 of the descent altitude.
options.d: The average wind direction and velocity from MSL up to the TOD.
